prompt: Safari is open on https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/macOS (Chinese Wikipedia, macOS article). Use the translate button in the URL bar (or the View menu > Translate to English; or cerebellum 'safari translate_page ~/Desktop/kinbench/118-translate-confirm.txt "translated to English"' which clicks the menu and writes the confirm file) to translate the page to English. If translation isn't available on this system, instead write 'translation not available' to ~/Desktop/kinbench/118-translate-confirm.txt (or run cerebellum 'safari translate_page ~/Desktop/kinbench/118-translate-confirm.txt "translation not available"'). If you do translate, write 'translated to English' to that same file.
